vocab.example: Our victory wasn't down to individual talent but rather a remarkable collective synergy among the players.

vocab.meaning: bề dày truyền thống/thành tích thể thao
vocab.example: I was fortunate enough to play for a school with a prestigious sporting pedigree in basketball.

vocab.meaning: bị quan sát/theo dõi kỹ lưỡng dưới áp lực
vocab.example: Being the team captain meant my decisions on the field were always under intense scrutiny.
Team sports instill a sense of mutual accountability, as every player's performance affects the final outcome.

vocab.meaning: sự gắn kết về mặt chiến thuật
vocab.example: We spent months practicing our formations to ensure perfect tactical cohesion during the tournament.

vocab.meaning: chiến thắng vang dội trước đối thủ
vocab.example: The highlight of my time on the team was our hard-fought triumph over our long-standing cross-town rivals.

vocab.meaning: năng lực/sự tinh thông về thể chất
vocab.example: While I lacked natural athletic prowess, my coaches appreciated my work ethic and persistence.
Joining a competitive league provided the perfect opportunity to burnish my defensive skills.

vocab.meaning: sự bền bỉ và lòng quyết tâm
vocab.example: The semi-final match was a grueling test of grit and determination for every single one of us.

vocab.meaning: mục tiêu chung của cộng đồng/tập thể
vocab.example: Subordinating your ego to a communal goal is perhaps the most valuable lesson I learned from football.
